meaning: adj.文学(上)的,从事写作的,文艺的,精通文学的,书本的
examples: He edits the literary journal, Murmur.
He was asked to judge a literary competition.
Her poetry is full of obscure literary allusion.
Despite the success of this first substantial venture into literary criticism, or what F.
England has many artistic landmarks, but few can match the literary cachet of Haworth Village.
